text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the autumn Tenno Sho soon approaching,
an unexpected visitor comes looking for
Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, but... is Fukukitaru here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka?! Is it really you?! What are you doing
here?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's been ages, or maybe it hasn't...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's one of those... or maybe in between. Um, do
you have a minute? I'd like to talk with you and
your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! It really feels like autumn outside. The
taste of steamy, roasted sweet potatoes and
chestnuts makes this season such a happy time!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Happy, huh? Hey, Fukukitaru... Are you happy
now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering if things have changed for you.
At one point, you seemed pretty lost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right... I'm so sorry about what happened
back at the Kinko Sho. I've been wanting to
apologize to you again...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But if I had to say one way or the other, I think I
really am happy these days. Probably!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have so many precious people in my life now,
like my trainer and my fans!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm having so much fun giving my best in my
races—experiencing the ups and downs of running
with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But even more than that, I found the way to
become happy on a
super-ultra-mega-great-blessing level!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The secret is... not dying!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if you want to keep spending time with
the people important to you, you've got to live as
long as you can, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A hundred years is better than fifty! Two hundred
is even better! Just think about all that extra time!
Long live long life!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Long life... I'm so happy to hear that you found
what makes you happy, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What about you, Suzuka? Are you happy?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I'm okay. But there is still
something holding me back...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I haven't reached it yet—the other side of speed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right, you told me about that before. Do you
think you'll get there?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting close, I think. I get the feeling that's
where my happiness lies.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It may only last for a moment, but I'm going to
find a way to be just as happy as you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I have to get going now. I still haven't
finished all the race entry paperwork.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay! See you later, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yes?
choice_data_list:
I know you have it in you. Be patient with
yourself—you'll get there.

I know you have it in you. Be patient with
yourself—you'll get there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I'm doing very well right
now, so I think I'll be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both see happiness in completely different
ways, and both of them have found their own
paths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru continues to wave goodbye
long after Silence Suzuka walks out of sight.
